name: kn-wiki-kb
description: Wikipedia knowledge base for the Kerr-Newman Lab: polite crawler over astronomy/astrophysics/cosmology topics + scientists + history of science in 8 languages (zh-TW/en priority), Wikidata knowledge graph, hybrid BM25+vector RAG with time decay, CRUD admin, and a periodic update checker. Zero npm dependencies (node:sqlite + local Ollama embeddings).
author: Chang Wei Lin

scripts.check: node --check config.mjs && node --check lib/db.mjs && node --check lib/wiki-api.mjs && node --check lib/seeds.mjs && node --check lib/chunk.mjs && node --check lib/embed.mjs && node --check lib/graph.mjs && node --check lib/retrieve.mjs && node --check lib/ingest.mjs && node --check lib/discover.mjs && node --check crawl.mjs && node --check check-updates.mjs && node --check kb-admin.mjs && node --check server.mjs
